Surgery Once the patient is prepped and stabilized, character with the Surgery Skill can step in and perform emergency treatment stave off death: The surgery takes hour plus the total wound value of all wounds suffered by the patient times min utes character with MedTech must be present throughout the operation t0 act as surgical assistant: The difficulty modifier for the Surgery Skill Check is equal to the total wound value of all wounds suffered by the target minus the character'$ BOD WIL (in other words_ the same modifier the MedTech Check had): Proper equipment important in this situation: the treat: ing character has a advanced medical kit but is not in fully equipped hospital; the target number has Modifier Treatment impossible witnout least advanced medica Other modifiers may apply to the TN as usual for Action Checks (see Modifiers_ 16). The surgica assistant counts as skilled character helping he has Surgery Skill. If the Surgery Check succeeds, the target character longer in immediate danger of dying: Continuing attention from character with MedTech necessary t0 maintain stable con: dition until the wounds themselves are actually treated (see below)  Every hours_ MedTech Check is required to keep the character from "crashing and returning to critical condition (in which case the whole process must be started over again at First Aid, 991.
MedTech If the stabilized character reaches properly equipped facil: Ity in time the next step in preventing death is the application of various monitors, IV tubes and other life support equipment; as well as the administration of various drugs. This treatment takes minutes and uses the MedTech Skill The difficulty modifier for the MedTech Skill Check is equal to the total wound value of all wounds suffered by the target minus the character's BOD WIL (in other words_ tne same modifier the First Aid Check had). Proper equipment is important this situation: the treat- ing character has an advanced medica kit but is not in fully equipped   hospital, the target number has Modifier: Treatment impossible without at least an advanced medical kit. Other modifiers may apply to the TN usual for Action Checks (see Modifiers; 16}. If the MedTech Check succeeds the target character I5 sta bilized_ The character who performed MedTech must provide continuing life support to the target: No additional Skill Rolls are required but tne treating character must spend Complex Action every turn ad stay in physical contact with the patient at all times. If life support not maintained tne character reverts to the condition he was before receiving First Aid; resume the countdown t0 death from where you left off. The patient will survive for length of time equal to his WIL minutes So ong as he receives constant Iife support: Any minutes character had remaining to receive MedTech care
UNTREATED WOUND RECOVERY Grazing_ Minor and Serious Wounds will heal on their Own given enough time and rest, but Minor and Serious Wounds will not heal properly without treatment from characters with the MedTech and/or Surgery Skills Without any medical treatment; wounds recover at the rate week for Grazing Wounds, 106 weeks for Minor Wounds and 606 weeks for Serious Wounds These healing periods are consecutive not simultaneous_ and lesser wounds are healed first, The character must be resting in reasonably clean and area and take no action more strenuous than eating going t0 the bathroom. character recovers from wound without any treatment at all; he does not heal properly: Based on the kind of injury Sut: fered (using the type of wound and the Hit Location Table), the lasting effects of the injury are described below under Wound Treatment:
